summary: Search routes a non-empty --type to a type-filtered FTS query, and expands snapshot records into their individual items — stamping each item with the snapshot's parent provenance (city, category, taken_at, and any other top-level field) under a "_snapshot" key.
reason: A --type filter must narrow results rather than fall through to an unfiltered search, and items detached from a snapshot must stay attributable to when and where they were captured so agent callers can reason about freshness and geographic scope.
validated_outcome: internal/cli/search_test.go covers provenance preservation, no-clobber of an item's own fields, future-key carry, non-snapshot and unparseable pass-through, and the empty/zero-match query paths.
